mapper.insert: INSERT INTO detections ( user_id, video_id, timestamp_sec, image_hash, subtitle_summary, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{videoId}, #{timestampSec}, #{imageHash}, #{subtitleSummary}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE detections SET target_name = #{targetName}, category_name = #{categoryName}, brand = #{brand}, model_name = #{modelName}, color = #{color}, shape = #{shape}, logo_text = #{logoText}, key_features_json = #{keyFeaturesJson}, confidence = #{confidence}, status = #{status} WHERE detection_id = #{detectionId}
mapper.select: SELECT detection_id, user_id, video_id, timestamp_sec, image_hash, subtitle_summary, target_name, category_name, brand, model_name, color, shape, logo_text, key_features_json, confidence, status, created_at FROM detections WHERE detection_id = #{detectionId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT detection_id AS detectionId, video_id AS videoId, timestamp_sec AS timestampSec, target_name AS targetName, category_name AS categoryName, brand AS brand, confidence AS confidence, status AS status, created_at AS createdAt FROM detections WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, detection_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
